storyboard.content: Sudden, severe crushing chest pain that started about 45 minutes ago and is not going away
Pain is radiating down my left arm and up into my jaw
I am very short of breath
Pain is 9 out of 10, I feel faint and cannot find a comfortable position, and nothing is making it better
Started suddenly 45 minutes ago and has been getting worse since
65-year-old male with a history of high blood pressure
